evidence_label: mitapivat seven-domain owner action map, not medical advice

source_checks.source_role: Confirms that TDT review spans diagnosis, transfusion, iron, organ monitoring, multidisciplinary care, HCT, gene manipulation, and disease-modifying agents.
Supports transfusion-burden, matching, antibody, reaction, and hemoglobin-response record ownership.
Supports ferritin, liver iron, cardiac T2*, chelation, and organ-risk record ownership.
Adult-label, liver-injury, REMS, hepatic-impairment, and interaction boundary for mitapivat.
Pediatric TDT mitapivat watchlist record; API check showed not-yet-recruiting, no posted results, last update 2026-04-08, version 2026-05-19.
Pediatric NTDT mitapivat watchlist record; API check showed not-yet-recruiting, no posted results, last update 2026-04-08, version 2026-05-19.

domain_owner_matrix.minimum_private_evidence: Subtype wording, hemoglobin fraction context, and HBB/HBA/HPFH or modifier records when available.
domain_owner_matrix.owner_question: Which diagnosis and genotype records are sufficient before any mitapivat review-readiness question?

domain_owner_matrix.minimum_private_evidence: Age band and weight band only; no exact birth date or raw growth record in public Git.
domain_owner_matrix.owner_question: Which age and weight band is safe to use for adult-label versus pediatric-watchlist separation?

domain_owner_matrix.minimum_private_evidence: Interval pattern, units or volume, body weight, pre/post hemoglobin context, reaction labels, and clinic-calculated annual ml/kg/year if available.
domain_owner_matrix.owner_question: Is transfusion burden quantified enough to interpret any transfusion-reduction endpoint?

domain_owner_matrix.minimum_private_evidence: Ferritin trend, liver iron concentration, cardiac T2*, chelation identity, and organ-monitoring labels.
domain_owner_matrix.owner_question: Are iron and organ records complete enough for safety-context review?

domain_owner_matrix.minimum_private_evidence: Liver test trend and hepatobiliary context labels.
domain_owner_matrix.owner_question: Is liver-safety context adequate for a clinician-only mitapivat review question?

domain_owner_matrix.minimum_private_evidence: Current medicine categories and interaction-review owner labels.
domain_owner_matrix.owner_question: Who should review current medicines for CYP3A, UGT1A1, P-gp, and narrow-therapeutic-index interaction context?

domain_owner_matrix.minimum_private_evidence: Owner category labels for regulatory, pharmacy, trial, payer, and affordability constraints.
domain_owner_matrix.owner_question: If the hematologist says review is worth continuing, which non-clinical owner should receive which access question?

release_policy: Public artifacts may include domain labels, owner categories, public-safe questions, next-state labels, and source URLs only. Raw records, exact dates, contact details, screenshots, doctor messages, owner replies, and patient-specific instructions stay out of Git.
decision_rule: Ask the May 17 clinician-review question only when every domain is either privately label-ready and public-release checked, with no raw data placed in the public repo.
